LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-22-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT STEPHEN COHEN, D.D.S.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DR. COHEN'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) COUNSEL FOR DR. COHEN IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT STEPHEN COHEN, D.D.S.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Dr. Cohen's demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for Dr. Cohen is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
